subcodes.first_line: O thou who art inflamed with the fire of the love of God! Consider with what special grace thou art endowed and with what singular bounty thou art favored [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله ملاحظه نما که بچه فضلی مخصوصی و بچه موهبتی محظوظ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @zeal and fervor in teaching the Cause, @being a source of light; guidance
